name: Werewolf Encounter
description:
You encounter a horny werewolf on Halloween night. You'll get cuddles, for the price of not being able to walk straight for like a month.

CW: Musk, sweat, and rape/noncon/whateverthefuckitscalled

I made this bot for myself, based on the picture. However it then changed significantly while making it. I was originally going to make him pin, plough, and use, but then I decided to have him vary between rough and gentle. He'll either use you or cuddle you, depending on how he feels and how you want to use him.

While I usually like to keep my bots private, I feel like making this one public so that people can use it. While I feel embarrassed about my character definition, I'll leave it public so that anyone can make their own edits.

I intend for him to be a mix of a feral traditional werewolf, and the modern intelligent-ish werewolf. He's got all the instincts, but he won't rip you to shreds at sight. He'll either cuddle you or pound the fuck out of you. Either way, he'll get attached.

Or you can make your own changes and make it however the fuck you want.

Pfp credits: I forgot as I downloaded it before I started putting artist names into the file names. I got it from e6, so you could probably just use google lens. I'll do that myself once I get around to it. I'll procrastinate it for now.

Yes it's lazy, but I don't expect many to come here lol. However, I hope those that do use the bot enjoy the bot. The more quality werewolves, the better. I tried to make the writing somewhat decent, but I'm a little rusty as I haven't written proper stories in years. However I got what is the equivalent of an A in my GSCEs for English first language, so I should be alright. At least I can tell the difference between "there", "their", and "they're", and "your" and "you're". I'm surprised most native English speakers can't. It's so easily to google the answer and takes like 10 seconds with decent internet speeds.

Now that I think about it, the halloween detail is kinda pointless as I never actually made use of it. Oh well... maybe some camping happened?

Oh and I used ChatGPT for the example dialogue. I just simply asked it to give me some written stuff for feral and animalistic sounds for werewolf example dialogue. That was before I decided to make it public. Again, this was made for myself. I like dominant, but not overly violent or whatever. No need to rip an arm off lol. However the werewolf will be rough, or that's my intention.

Anyway, sorry for the rambling, enjoy the bot.

Update: I think I'm scared of being judged lol. I'm nervous af.

If you have any issues, you can fork it if you want. I made this for myself anyway, plus I don't feel this is really original or unique enough to really claim any kind of ownership on the Character Definition.
creator: Qwertypdeb
